name: Nuvio (Unofficial)
subtitle: Full & Enhanced Nuvio builds for AltStore / SideStore.

apps.name: Nuvio
apps.subtitle: Watch your library, anywhere
apps.localizedDescription: Unofficial Full build of Nuvio Mobile for iOS / iPadOS.

versions.localizedDescription:
# 🚀 Release v0.2.23

## You can now add AltStore/SideStore source
**Nuvio Full:**
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/main/NuvioFull.json
```
**Nuvio Enhanced:**
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/main/NuvioEnhanced.json
```

## Upstream changelog:
* added customizable card depth effects. @tapframe
* Fixed a critical regression that could reset synced profile settings. @tapframe

---

## Variants

### Nuvio Full
This variant is similar to the official TestFlight version with unlocked Plugins and in-app Trailers.

### Nuvio Enhanced
This custom variant includes experimental features, quality-of-life improvements, and specific bug fixes not yet available in the upstream repository.

**Added Features:**

# 🚀 Release v0.2.22

This release is based on the upstream **Nuvio v0.2.22**, see official release details [here](https://github.com/NuvioMedia/NuvioMobile/releases/tag/0.2.22).

---

## Variants

### Nuvio Full
This variant is similar to the official TestFlight version with unlocked Plugins and in-app Trailers.

### Nuvio Enhanced
This custom variant includes experimental features, quality-of-life improvements, and specific bug fixes not yet available in the upstream repository.

**Added Features:**
* Added Now Playing Control in the Notification, Lockscreen, and Widget with media metadata and artwork.
* Added a volume boost feature (up to 200%) for quieter streams.
* Added support for Live TV integrations.
* Added stream quality selection in Player Control.
* Add artwo

# 🚀 Release v0.2.21

This release is based on the upstream **Nuvio v0.2.21**, see official release details [here](https://github.com/NuvioMedia/NuvioMobile/releases/tag/0.2.21).

### Nuvio Enhanced
This custom variant includes experimental features, quality-of-life improvements, and specific bug fixes not yet available in the upstream repository.

**Added Features:**
* Added Now Playing Control in the Notification, Lockscreen, and Widget with media metadata and artwork.
* Added a volume boost feature (up to 200%) for quieter streams.
* Added support for Live TV integrations.
* Added stream quality selection in Player Control.
* Add artwo
